prompt: Rank these waterfalls from shortest to tallest

items.name: Niagara Falls
items.fact: 51 m tall — highest flow rate in North America

items.name: Iguazu Falls
items.fact: 82 m tall — spanning Argentina and Brazil

items.name: Victoria Falls
items.fact: 108 m tall — the largest curtain of falling water

items.name: Yosemite Falls
items.fact: 739 m tall — tallest waterfall in Yosemite Park

items.name: Angel Falls
items.fact: 979 m tall — tallest uninterrupted waterfall in the world
